MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-24-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ELLIS BREUX'S MOTION FOR HEARING ON ADMINISTRATIVE WRIT (CCP 1094.5) AND REQUEST FOR STAY IS CONTINUED FROM SEPTEMBER 24, 2015 TO OCTOBER 9, 2015 PER THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/EG

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ELLIS BREUX'S MOTION FOR HEARING ON ADMINISTRATIVE WRIT (CCP SEC. 1094.5) AND REQUEST FOR STAY IS GRANTED, THE DECISION OF THE RENT BOARD'S ALJ DATED OCTOBER 23, 2014 IS VACATED, AND THE CASE IS REMANDED TO RESPONDENT FOR FURTHER PROCEEDINGS IN LIGHT OF THE LANDLORD'S AGREEMENT THAT THE UNIT FALLS WITHIN, AND IS NOT EXEMPTED FROM, THE RENT ORDINANCE. COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR A STATEMENT OF DECISION. COURT INFORMS COUNSEL THAT ITS TENTATIVE RULING SHALL BECOME ITS PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION WHICH THE COURT SHALL SEND TO PARTIES. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion To Move For New Trial
Off Calendar Feb-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ELLIS BREUX'S Motion To Move For New Trial is off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion For Hearing On Administrative Writ (Ccp §1094.5) And Request For Stay
Off Calendar Oct-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DENNIS ZARAGOZA, ESQ. of Law Offices of Dennis Zaragoza, Tel No. 510-375-7238 appearing for the Petitioner;
Deputy City Attorney WAYNE K. SNODGRASS of the San Francisco Office of the City Attorney, Tel No. 415-554-4700 appearing for Respondent San Francisco Residential Rent Stabilization and Arbitration Award;
Atty. MARK B. CHERNEV, ESQ. of Zacks & Freedman APC, Tel No. 415-956-8100 appearing for Real Party in Interest John Gall.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ELLIS BREUX'S Motion For Hearing On Administrative Writ (CCP Sec. 1094.5) And Request For Stay is granted, the decision of the Rent Board's ALJ dated October 23, 2014 is vacated, and the case is remanded to respondent for further proceedings in light of the landlord's agreement that the unit falls within, and is not exempted from, the Rent Ordinance. Court grants Petitioner's request for a statement of decision. Court informs counsel that its tentative ruling shall become its proposed statement of decision which the Court shall send to parties. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion For Hearing On Administrative Writ (Ccp §1094.5) And Request For Stay
Off Calendar Sep-24-2015 Continued To Oct-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court modified its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
PETITIONER ELLIS BREUX'S Motion For Hearing On Administrative Writ (CCP 1094.5) And Request For Stay is continued to October 9, 2015 per the agreement of the parties. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/eg
